# Workflow Vault

[![wf](https://img.shields.io/badge/wf-cli-black?logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://github.com/sagoez/workflow)

A curated collection of 90+ reusable shell workflows for [wf-cli](https://github.com/sagoez/workflow).

Browse, search, and copy resolved commands from the web — or sync them directly with the CLI:

```bash
wf sync --remote-url git@github.com:sagoez/workflow-vault.git
```

## Development

```bash
npm install
npm run dev      # dev server with hot reload on localhost:3000
npm run build    # build to web/site/index.html
```
